What We Do

Our Services

Professional siding installer solutions tailored to your needs.

Vinyl Siding Installation

Durable and affordable siding solutions for Philadelphia homes.

Learn More →

Fiber Cement Siding Installation

Durable, fire-resistant siding that mimics the look of wood.

Learn More →

Siding Repair

Expert siding repair services to protect your home from the elements.

Learn More →

Soffit and Fascia Repair

Protecting your roofline with expert soffit and fascia repair.

Learn More →

Siding Replacement

Complete siding replacement services to revitalize your home's exterior.

Learn More →

Storm Damage Repair

Fast and reliable siding repair after severe weather events.

Learn More →

Financing That Works With Your Goals

We believe every customer deserves access to top-quality siding installer services. That's why we offer flexible options to fit any budget. No stress, no surprises — just a clear path forward.

Reviews

Trusted By Our Community

Total Roofing and Siding did an amazing job on our row home in South Philly! The new vinyl siding looks fantastic and has really updated the look of the whole block. The team was professional, efficient, and cleaned up everything perfectly. Highly recommend!

Maria S.
★★★★★

We had some storm damage on our fiber cement siding in Chestnut Hill. Total Roofing and Siding came out quickly and repaired the damaged sections seamlessly. You can't even tell there was any damage! Great work.

David K.
★★★★

Our soffit was rotting, and we were worried about water damage. Total Roofing and Siding replaced the damaged sections promptly and professionally. Their team was courteous and explained everything clearly. I'll be calling them again for future needs.

Jessica L.
★★★★★

After getting several quotes, we chose Total Roofing and Siding to replace the siding on our Victorian twin in West Philly. They were the most knowledgeable and offered the best price. The new fiber cement siding looks beautiful, and we've already noticed a difference in our energy bills!

Robert B.
★★★★★

Total Roofing and Siding did a great job on my home. They were friendly, professional, and got the job done quickly. There was a slight delay due to weather, but they communicated well and kept me informed throughout the process. I am very happy with the results!

Susan M.
★★★★

After a particularly bad Nor'easter, our siding was a mess. Total Roofing and Siding responded quickly, assessed the damage, and worked with our insurance company to get everything fixed. They made a stressful situation much easier to handle.

Michael D.
★★★★★
Read All Reviews →
How It Works

We'll Guide You Through!

From first call to final walkthrough, here's what to expect.

01

Contact Our Team

Reach out by phone or through our online form. We'll schedule a time that works best for you.

02

Inspection

Our certified team will thoroughly evaluate your needs and provide a detailed, transparent estimate.

03

We Get to Work

Our experienced team handles everything — from start to finish — with precision and care.

04

Final Walkthrough

We walk through the completed work with you to ensure every detail meets our high standards.

Our Promise

Why Choose Total Roofing and Siding Inc.

Excellence

We hold ourselves to the highest standards on every single job — no shortcuts, no compromises.

Community

We're your neighbors first. Every job we complete strengthens the community we call home.

FAQ

Your Questions, Our Expert Advice

How long does vinyl siding installation take?
The duration depends on the size and complexity of the project, but most installations are completed within a week.
What are the benefits of insulated vinyl siding?
Insulated vinyl siding provides enhanced energy efficiency, reducing heating and cooling costs. It also improves soundproofing and impact resistance.
How do I clean my vinyl siding?
Vinyl siding can be easily cleaned with soap and water and a soft brush. Avoid using harsh chemicals or pressure washers, which can damage the siding.

Excellence. Community. Integrity.
